notes: Fixed Google Sheets On-the-go connected state so a successful OAuth session remains usable after Streamlit reruns.
Rebuilt hosted Google credentials directly from the short-lived access token rather than the authorised-user helper that expects refresh-token style payloads.
After Google Sheets connects, Pathmark now attempts to create the Pathmark sync sheet automatically so Save to my Pathmark sync sheet is available sooner.
Kept the Supabase migration and Secret API key access model unchanged.
